reason: Automated keyword capture-recapture is invalid for this scope: mechanism-carries-function membership is an expert-judgment relation that no keyword predicate replicates. Strict (mechanism-keyword) filters drop canonical in-scope papers whose abstracts are function-forward (Fries 2015, Womelsdorf 2007, Buzsaki-Wang 2012); loose (gamma+function) filters admit the balloon the scope excludes. Three measurement attempts logged in runlog.jsonl (m=0, then broad-balloon N=1811, then N=1034 with 36/44 memory papers dropped).
next_step: citation-graph escalation (runbook phase 6): sample recall via anchor + memory reference/citation networks, which encode the semantic 'these papers talk to each other' relation that keywords miss.
